verdict.summary: The change closes both producer- and consumer-side fail-open paths. account-usage now omits Anthropic entries unless status is non-empty and both base utilization windows are finite numeric strings within [0,1]; select-and-claim independently requires allowed status and numeric utilization within [0,1], which also rejects NaN and infinities through the chained comparison. The added self-tests are non-vacuous and cover valid entries plus empty/missing status, missing/non-numeric windows, NaN, negative, and above-range values. No trust checks are weakened and no security-sensitive workflow or token handling is expanded.
